# defold-typescript

This is the offline knowledge pack for the defold-typescript toolchain — write Defold game scripts in TypeScript and transpile them to Lua. Link convention: paths under `guide/` are relative to this file; paths starting `@defold-typescript/` or `lua-types/` are package specifiers resolved under `node_modules/`. The `.d.ts`/`.ts` targets are the authoritative typed API surface.

For the Defold engine's own machine docs, see https://defold.com/llms.txt.

Only guide pages are inlined into `llms-full.txt`; pages marked `llms-full: false` (long tutorials) are linked here but omitted from that full-text pack.

## Key docs for agents

- [Agent runbooks](guide/agent-runbooks.md)
- [TypeScript gotchas](guide/typescript-gotchas.md)
- [Script lifecycle](guide/script-lifecycle.md)
- [Messages](guide/messages.md)
- [Vector math](guide/vector-math.md)

- [TypeScript vs Lua](guide/typescript-vs-lua.md)
- [TypeScript gotchas](guide/typescript-gotchas.md)
- [Data structures](guide/data-structures.md)
- [Script lifecycle](guide/script-lifecycle.md)
- [Messages](guide/messages.md)

- [Vector math](guide/vector-math.md)

- [Agent runbooks](guide/agent-runbooks.md)

- [Native extensions](guide/extensions.md)
- [API docs vs `ts-defold-types`](guide/api-docs-vs-ts-defold.md)
- [Migrating from `ts-defold`](guide/migrating-from-ts-defold.md)

## API

- [globals](@defold-typescript/types/src/engine-globals.d.ts)
- [b2d](@defold-typescript/types/generated/b2d.d.ts)
- [b2d.body](@defold-typescript/types/generated/b2d_body.d.ts)
- [buffer](@defold-typescript/types/generated/buffer.d.ts)
- [camera](@defold-typescript/types/generated/camera.d.ts)
